interests.title: Tree-ring Stable Isotopes
interests.description: Analyzing oxygen, carbon, and hydrogen isotopes preserved in tree-ring cellulose to reconstruct past hydroclimate and atmospheric conditions.

interests.title: Cultural Heritage Science & Archaeology
interests.description: Applying dendrochronological methods to date and authenticate wooden artifacts, historic structures, and archaeological materials.

interests.title: Dendroclimatology
interests.description: Using tree-ring width and density chronologies to reconstruct historical climate variability at regional to continental scales.

interests.title: Paleoclimatology
interests.description: Integrating multiple proxy records to understand long-term climate dynamics, natural variability, and forcing mechanisms.

interests.title: Hydroclimate Reconstruction in East Asia
interests.description: Developing high-resolution precipitation and drought reconstructions for East Asia using tree-ring networks and historical archives.
